classification.task_goal: Create a PyQt5 application with a specific UI and functionality for machine learning predictions.
primary_constraints: The app must have 1 text entry and 6 buttons (run, move, question, save, train, predict).
The predict function must utilize a CNN model for predictions.
classification.reasoning: The conversation maintained the core task of creating a PyQt5 application with specified functionality and constraints throughout. There were no violations of the constraints, and the user did not change the task or abandon any constraints.
